final_answer: Hi there! I'm Isabella Johansson, zip code 32286. I'm a bit pressed for time, so I'd love to handle two things at once if possible — I need to return a hose and a backpack, and also exchange my hiking boots for the exact same model but in the waterproof version. If you can only do one, please prioritize the exchange for the waterproof hiking boots. Can we get started?
